min_entry_age.source_quote: Policy can be availed by persons between the age of 18 years and 65 years, as Proposer.

max_entry_age.source_quote: Policy can be availed by persons between the age of 18 years and 65 years, as Proposer.

min_child_entry_age.source_quote: Dependent children (i.e natural or legally adopted) between the age of 3 months to 25 years

grace_period.source_quote: For Yearly, Half-yearly, Quarterly payment of mode, a fixed period of 30 days is to be allowed as Grace Period and for monthly mode of payment a fixed period of 15 days be allowed as grace period.

free_look_period.source_quote: free look period of 30 days beginning from the date of receipt of policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with us.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of the following listed conditions, surgeries/ treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24/36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first Policy with the Insurer.

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-Hospitalisation For 30 days prior to the date of hospitalisation.

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post-Hospitalisation For 60 days from the date of discharge from the hospital.

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Chola MS family plans: 141 day care procedures; Flexi Health: 539)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 13,500+ Cashless Hospitals ('Why Chola MS' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: Each and every claim under the Policy shall be subject to a co-payment of 5% applicable to claim amount admissible and payable as per the terms and conditions of the Policy.

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: Room Rent, Boarding, Nursing expenses as provided by the Hospital/Nursing Home up to 2% of Sum Insured subject to maximum of Rs 5,000 per day. ii. Intensive Care Unit (ICU)/Intensive Cardiac Care Unit (ICCU) expenses up to 5% of Sum Insured subject to maximum of Rs 10,000 per day. iii.

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment refers to hospitalisation treatments given under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless Facility means a facility extended by the Insurer to the Insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the Insured Person

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus will be increased by 5% in respect of each claim free policy year (where no claims are reported), provided the policy is renewed with the company without a break subject to maximum of 50% of the Sum Insured

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote: Category of Cover Indemnity Sum Insured INR On Individual basis – SI shall apply to each individual family member. On Floater Basis – SI shall apply to the entire family.

room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent, Boarding, Nursing expenses as provided by the Hospital/Nursing Home up to 2% of Sum Insured subject to maximum of Rs 5,000 per day.

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus will be increased by 5% in respect of each claim free policy year

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 7.15 Maternity Expenses: (Code-Excl 18): i. Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections incurred during hospitalisation) except ectopic pregnancy; ii. Expenses towards miscarriage (unless due to an accident) and lawful medical termination of pregnancy during the policy period. (wordings p.20-21)
